title: ANC MP Dugmore visits schools on opening day
description: GEORGE NEWS - ANC MP for George Cameron...
bodyText:
Video

GEORGE NEWS - ANC MP for George Cameron Dugmore visited Jonga High, Thembalethu High, York High and Heidedal Primary School on the first day of school to check on the schools' readiness.


> He also made use of the opportunity to share some insights and ideas on education with the school principals, deputy principals as well as ward councillors.


Dugmore is involved in a project for Heidedal Primary, trying to support them in their efforts to build a school hall.

"We're working with the school and department and are also looking at a private sector partnership with the Archway Foundation to try and see whether a school hall here is possible. It's been a longtime dream of the school," said Dugmore.

At Jonga the importance of schools setting up alumnus/past pupils associations to support the school was discussed.

He is to meet with the education district office today (Thursday) to get an overall sense of the first day with a particular focus on any learners who are still not placed.

During the visit to York High with the headmaster, Francois Moll (right).

VIDEO: Discussions at Jonga High:

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
